---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or new command for the bot
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Is your feature request related to a problem?**
A clear description of the problem. E.g. "I can't see bandwidth usage per device..."

**Describe the solution you'd like**
What command or behavior should be added?

**Telegram command proposal** (if applicable)
```
/mycommand <arg1> <arg2>
```

**OpenWRT tools involved**
Which OpenWRT tools or packages would this feature use? (e.g., `tc`, `nft-qos`, `iptables`, `ubus`)

**Additional context**
Any other context, links, or examples.
